title: Genesys Cloud average MOS is degraded
description: Mean Opinion Score (MOS) measures perceived voice call quality; a drop means customers may be experiencing degraded audio. This monitor alerts when the average conversation MOS from Genesys Cloud falls below an acceptable threshold, so call-quality issues are caught early.

definition.message: The average Genesys Cloud conversation MOS has dropped below {{threshold}} for {{region.name}}, indicating degraded call quality.
definition.name: [Genesys Cloud MOS] Average MOS is degraded on {{region.name}}
